facebook.content:
"Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest." Matthew 11:28

This invitation is for every area of your life. Are you weary from chasing temporary fixes or tired of bearing the weight of worry? Jesus offers you rest, not just from your struggles, but from the very things that weigh you down. What burdens are you willing to lay down and receive rest in today?
facebook.fullPost:

instagram.content:
"For the word of God is living and active. Sharper than any two-edged sword, it penetrates even to dividing soul and spirit, joints and marrow; it judges the thoughts and attitudes of the heart." - Hebrews 4:12

This sword cuts through every lie, exposing the deepest thoughts and desires of your heart.

tiktok.content:
Matthew 28:18 - "All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me."

When Jesus says, "all authority"... it's not just some authority, it's EVERY authority. It's not just some power, it's EVERY power.
